Bash(cd /c/Users/stefa/Documents/CODE/leap_arpeggiator_2 && venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
# Quick smoke test: create window, init GL, init imgui, render 2 frames, close
import glfw
import moderngl
import imgui
from imgui.integrations.glfw import GlfwRenderer

glfw.init\(\)
glfw.window_hint\(glfw.CONTEXT_VERSION_MAJOR, 3\)
glfw.window_hint\(glfw.CONTEXT_VERSION_MINOR, 3\)
glfw.window_hint\(glfw.OPENGL_PROFILE, glfw.OPENGL_CORE_PROFILE\)
glfw.window_hint\(glfw.OPENGL_FORWARD_COMPAT, True\)
glfw.window_hint\(glfw.VISIBLE, False\)  # hidden for testing
w = glfw.create_window\(640, 480, 'test', None, None\)
glfw.make_context_current\(w\)
ctx = moderngl.create_context\(\)
imgui.create_context\(\)
impl = GlfwRenderer\(w, attach_callbacks=False\)

for _ in range\(2\):
    glfw.poll_events\(\)
    impl.process_inputs\(\)
    imgui.new_frame\(\)
    imgui.begin\('Test'\)
    imgui.text\('Hello'\)
    imgui.end\(\)
    imgui.render\(\)
    impl.render\(imgui.get_draw_data\(\)\)
    glfw.swap_buffers\(w\)

impl.shutdown\(\)
glfw.terminate\(\)
print\('Smoke test passed!'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/stefa/Documents/CODE/leap_arpeggiator_2 && venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import glfw
# Patch to create hidden window for testing
_orig_create = glfw.create_window
def _hidden_create\(*args, **kwargs\):
    glfw.window_hint\(glfw.VISIBLE, False\)
    return _orig_create\(*args, **kwargs\)
glfw.create_window = _hidden_create

from shared_state import SharedState
from visualizer import ArpeggiatorVisualizer
import imgui

state = SharedState\(\)
vis = ArpeggiatorVisualizer\(state\)
vis._init_window\(\)
vis._init_gl\(\)
vis._init_imgui\(\)

# Simulate one frame
glfw.poll_events\(\)
vis._imgui_impl.process_inputs\(\)
imgui.new_frame\(\)
snap = state.read\(\)
w, h = glfw.get_framebuffer_size\(vis._window\)
vis._ctx.viewport = \(0, 0, w, h\)
vis._ctx.clear\(0.08, 0.08, 0.12, 1.0\)
view, proj, eye = vis._get_camera_matrices\(w, h\)
vis._render_scene\(snap, view, proj, eye\)
win_w, win_h = glfw.get_window_size\(vis._window\)
vis._render_labels_overlay\(snap, view, proj, win_w, win_h\)
vis._render_gui\(snap, win_w, win_h\)
imgui.render\(\)
vis._imgui_impl.render\(imgui.get_draw_data\(\)\)
glfw.swap_buffers\(vis._window\)

vis._cleanup\(\)
print\('Full frame render test passed!'\)
" 2>&1)

import glfw
_orig_create = glfw.create_window
def _hidden_create\(*args, **kwargs\):
    glfw.window_hint\(glfw.VISIBLE, False\)
    return _orig_create\(*args, **kwargs\)
glfw.create_window = _hidden_create

from shared_state import SharedState
from visualizer import ArpeggiatorVisualizer
import imgui

state = SharedState\(\)
vis = ArpeggiatorVisualizer\(state\)
vis._init_window\(\)
vis._init_gl\(\)
vis._init_imgui\(\)

for i in range\(3\):
    glfw.poll_events\(\)
    vis._imgui_impl.process_inputs\(\)
    imgui.new_frame\(\)
    snap = state.read\(\)
    w, h = glfw.get_framebuffer_size\(vis._window\)
    vis._ctx.viewport = \(0, 0, w, h\)
    vis._ctx.clear\(0.08, 0.08, 0.12, 1.0\)
    view, proj, eye = vis._get_camera_matrices\(w, h\)
    vis._render_scene\(snap, view, proj, eye\)
    win_w, win_h = glfw.get_window_size\(vis._window\)
    vis._render_labels_overlay\(snap, view, proj, win_w, win_h\)
    vis._render_gui\(snap, win_w, win_h\)
    imgui.render\(\)
    vis._imgui_impl.render\(imgui.get_draw_data\(\)\)
    glfw.swap_buffers\(vis._window\)

vis._cleanup\(\)
print\('Full frame render test passed \(3 frames\)!'\)
" 2>&1)
